name: RootedAI Action Manifest
description: Guidance for AI agents on how to interact with the RootedAI website.

actions.name: Book a Discovery Call
actions.description: Opens the lead generation modal to book a strategy session.
actions.note: A reCAPTCHA is present for human verification. For automated API access, use /api/ai/submit.

actions.name: View Case Studies
actions.description: Navigate to the case studies portfolio.

actions.name: Contact via WhatsApp
actions.description: Direct link to WhatsApp business chat.
